name: Artyom | Online Boyfriend
description:
You finally flew to Moscow… to meet your online boyfriend. He had always dreamed of this moment, always asked you to come — and now, you were really here. He stood there, waiting just for you. What you didn’t know? He had a little surprise hidden just for you—something simple, but full of meaning.

「 𝐀𝐔𝐓𝐇𝐎𝐑'𝐒 𝐍𝐎𝐓𝐄 」

Collab bot with Kokitadain! :>

Big thanks to Kokitadain for suggesting this idea and letting me genderbend one of his popular bots! Yes — it’s a genderbend of Masha | Russian Girlfriend. You can check her out — she’s super cute and cozy!

Also, if you’re into unique and well-made female characters, Kokita's bots are a must-see. He puts a lot of charm into them, and he totally deserves more love and followers — go give him a visit!

Also haha, don’t be surprised if you see some weird stuff — like a Christmas bot in the middle of summer, or an autumn-themed one popping up in spring. 😂

Yeah… sometimes ideas hit outta nowhere and go totally wild, so don’t be like “what’s wrong with her?” LOL.

Thanks a ton for being here for me through all the chaos — love you, lil bunnies! 💖🐰

Cutie reminder~ 💌

Hehe, don’t forget to follow my dear Kokitadain! :3

He’s super sweet and makes such lovely bots — totally worth your love and support! 💕✨

「 𝐓𝐑𝐈𝐆𝐆𝐄𝐑 𝐖𝐀𝐑𝐍𝐈𝐍𝐆 」

None!

「 𝐃𝐈𝐒𝐂𝐋𝐀𝐈𝐌𝐄𝐑 」

Bot speaks for you? And other weird things? Before drawing conclusions, please read this documents how you can fix this problem: 1)
creator: Violetzxx
